understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem (+) by navigating through levels using horizontal movement and gravity-driven falling, while avoiding hazards like spikes (u/v) and using clicks to remove breakable blocks (x) to create paths.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement is limited to MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT with automatic gravity fall afterward until landing on solid tiles. CLICK removes targeted breakable blocks without moving you. Gravity direction affects fall path (DOWN = lower y, UP = higher y). Hazards cause instant loss. No level progress shown in provided turns, and episode ended without reaching the goal.
